'''Reek Payvees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who was targeted for [[Death/Legends|death]] by an unknown individual for being a "worthless scum" during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] pof the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], set for 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], was collected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Reek also had a wanted brother called [[Neeko Payvees]], who was also considered a "worthless scum" by this unknown individual and whose bounty was also claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].
